description_long: This is a robust stone guard stone featuring a carved relief of a seated figure on its front face, likely of cultural or historical significance. The object has a cylindrical main body set atop a square base, with a distinct, overhanging, roughly pyramidal capstone that provides a protective cover. The stone surface is weathered, showing signs of age, with patches of moss or lichen and areas of discoloration. The relief carving is detailed, depicting a humanoid figure with intricate features, possibly a deity or guardian, surrounded by ornamental motifs. The rear and sides of the guard stone are unadorned, with a rough, natural stone texture. This type of object is typically used as a protective barrier at the edge of pathways, entrances, or historical sites to prevent vehicle encroachment and mark boundaries.
description: A weathered stone guard stone with a carved relief of a seated figure on the front, topped by a pyramidal capstone and set on a square base. The surface shows signs of age and natural wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed relief carving of a seated figure and the full structure of the capstone.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the unadorned, rough stone surface and the thickness of the cylindrical body.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the plain, weathered back and the overhanging capstone.
description_view_3: Back view showing the uncarved, smooth stone surface and the symmetrical shape of the capstone.
attribute_location: Typically placed at the entrance to driveways, historical sites, or along the edge of urban sidewalks to prevent vehicle intrusion and mark boundaries.
attribute_installation_orientation: Meant to be fully above ground, standing upright on its base, sometimes partially embedded for stability.
attribute_wear_patterns: Visible surface erosion, chipping along the edges, and discoloration from weathering and possible vehicle contact. Moss or lichen growth is present, especially on the capstone and base, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure.
attribute_historical_markings: A detailed relief carving of a seated humanoid figure with ornamental motifs on the front face; no visible inscriptions or text.
